description_long: This frying pan features a deep, cylindrical black body with a smooth, matte finish, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The pan is equipped with a single, straight handle that is colored in a striking red and black marbled pattern, suggesting a heat-resistant or decorative coating. The interior of the pan is spacious and unadorned, suitable for cooking or holding various items. The rim is thick and straight, lacking any flaring or pouring spouts, which emphasizes durability over specialized pouring functions. No visible brand logos or markings are present on either the pan or the handle. The bottom surface appears smooth and untextured, with no visible ridges, patterns, or stamps.
description: A deep, black frying pan with a straight, marbled red handle and a thick, smooth rim. The pan has a matte finish and no visible logos or bottom patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep, round black pan with the red handle extending directly away from the viewer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the straight, marbled red handle and the cylindrical depth of the pan.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the circular opening of the pan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle extending to the left and the smooth, thick rim of the pan.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of plastic or composite, marbled red and black, with a smooth cylindrical shape and no visible grip texture or ergonomic features.
attribute_rim_design: Thick, straight rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges; simple and robust.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and untextured, with no visible patterns, ridges, or markings.
